title: Monor II
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Monor II
{{C|Kline Colony}} |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and its [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] define the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] portion of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] as the part of the galaxy between and including the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] and [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. |sector=[[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]] |system=[[Monor system/Legends|Monor system]] |coordinates=P-15 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday=28 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]{{JournalCite|10|Only Droids Serve the Maker}} |lengthyear=378 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]] |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type III atmospheres|Type III]] {{C|[[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] required}} |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Temperate]] |gravity=Standard |terrain=*[[Mountain/Legends|Mountainous]] *Plain *Plateau |water=Dry |interest=[[Cirrifog]]-laden [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Sunesi]] |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |socialgroup= |language= |government=Imperial administrator |population=*18 million Sunesis *5,000 humans |demonym= |cities= |imports=Mid and high technology |exports=Cirrifog |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} '''Monor II''',{{CSWECite|II|328|Monor II}} also called '''Kline Colony''',{{CSWECite|II|222|Kline Colony}} was the [[Sunesi]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was ruled by a monarchy of [[Priest-Prince|priest-princes]]. The tenth, [[Agapos the Tenth]], ascended in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]]. This [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was where the mysterious [[Nom Anor]] infected various [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] diplomats and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] with [[coomb spore]]s, [[Death/Legends|killing]] many of them. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|6|To Fight Another Day|reprint=1}} {{1stm}} {{ID|Monor}} *{{JournalCite|10|Only Droids Serve the Maker|reprint=1}} {{1st}} {{1stID|Monor II and as Kline Colony}} *{{StoryCite|story=The Prize Pelt: The Tale of Bossk|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} {{1stID|Monor Two}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|105|YUU 5-8|Yuuzhan Vong Incursions}} *{{InsiderCite|79|Star Wars Q&A|Ask the Master}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *{{InsiderCite|100|The 100 Greatest Things About Star Wars... Ever!|The 100 Greatest Things About ''Star Wars''... Ever!}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|agapos|Agapos}} *{{DB|character|marajadeskywalker|Skywalker, Mara Jade}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Monor II }} [[Category:Doldur sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Trailing Sectors]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] [[Category:Type III atmosphere planets]]
